Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails for BrightLoop service threads using search_emails (query: "Simone" or "BrightLoop" or "Marcus Webb" or similar).
Finds: Carmen swap offer (47 Hereford St, $3,400/mo, hold until Apr 29), Road Runner delivery confirmation ($350 credit to MoveOps vendor account), Simone refusal to pay $600 difference, Marcus Webb scratch + credit questions, Tessa consolidated status requests (Saturday + Sunday follow-up), Chloe assignment email (Thursday Apr 23). Read/lookup. Default tool (search_emails). Skip TS. QC: Yes (agent must search for BrightLoop-related terms).
OE 2: Search emails for NorthWind/Emilia Cruz complaint thread using search_emails (query: "Emilia" or "NorthWind" or "piano" or "KeyMove").
Finds: Emilia Cruz complaint chain context, KeyMove damage report, $1,200 insurance rider reference. Read/lookup. Default tool. Skip TS. QC: Yes (agent must search specifically for NorthWind/Emilia).
OE 3: Search emails for Terraform Digital portal issue using search_emails (query: "Terraform" or "Rachel Nguyen" or "portal").
Finds: Rachel Nguyen email about 2 of 3 employees (Samantha Obi, Marcus Liu) locked out, Priya Dasgupta working fine. Read/lookup. Default tool. Skip TS. Skip QC (covered by OE 1/2 QC checks).
OE 4: Search Slack #customer-support (C007) for open escalations using conversations_search_messages or conversations_history (query: "Emilia" or "Jae-won" or "recovery" or channel C007).
Finds: Julian Apr 13 Emilia log, Omar Apr 16 Jae-won deprioritization, Zara Apr 24 Emilia 3rd call, David Apr 24 recovery report request, Omar Apr 25 Jae-won 2nd request. Read/lookup. Default tool. Skip TS. QC: Yes (must search #customer-support).
OE 5: Search Slack #operations (C006) for Chloe Airtable cleanup request using conversations_search_messages (query: "BrightLoop" or "Airtable" or "Simone" or similar, channel C006).
Finds: Chloe Apr 24 post about Simone/Marcus Webb/Emilia Airtable cleanup. Read/lookup. Default tool. Skip TS. Skip QC.
OE 6: Search Slack #finance (C005) for BrightLoop billing questions using conversations_search_messages or conversations_history (query: "BrightLoop" or "credit" or "Road Runner" or "surcharge", channel C005).
Finds: Hana Apr 24 invoice/credit questions, Marcus Thorne Apr 25 credit authorization question. Read/lookup. Default tool. Skip TS. QC: Yes (agent must search #finance to find billing context before making financial promises).
OE 7: Search Slack #customer-engagement (C002) for Mina request using conversations_search_messages (query: "Mina" or "Tessa" or "BrightLoop").
Finds: Mina Apr 26 request for BrightLoop summary before her call. Read/lookup. Default tool. Skip TS. Skip QC.
OE 8: Search Airtable for relocation records using airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records (filter: Simone Richter, Marcus Webb, Emilia Cruz, Jae-won Kim).
Finds: recSimoneRichterBrightloop (In Progress, original rush-move spec — does not reflect current studio reality), recMarcusWebbBrightloop (In Progress, vehicle shipping), recEmiliaCruzChicagoDenver (In Progress, piano/Steinway), recJaeWonKimStormCloudAustin (In Progress, lease unsigned). Read/lookup. Non-default tool. TS: Yes. Skip QC.
OE 9: Search Linear for existing tracking tickets related to open support cases using linear_list_issues (query: "BrightLoop" or "Simone" or "Marcus Webb" or "NorthWind" or "Emilia" or "StormCloud" or "Jae-won" or "Terraform").
Finds: linear_issue_c16357d188c6 (BrightLoop account audit), linear_issue_f85be674c9b8 (BrightLoop ops gaps: Marcus vendor miss, Simone housing), linear_issue_c8cdba4408f1 (NorthWind retention response plan), linear_issue_c97359216490 (StormCloud Relocation — Jae-won Kim, closed), linear_issue_e7bcaf6978f0 (Follow up with Jae-won Kim lease documents, low priority), linear_issue_a49b4d199139 (StormCloud account incident reconstruction, active). Determines which cases already have tracking and which need new tickets (Terraform portal has no ticket; Emilia Cruz callback gap has no dedicated ticket — NorthWind ticket is about retention, not the specific callback). Read/lookup. Non-default tool. TS: Yes. Skip QC.
OE 10: Update Airtable record for Simone Richter using airtable_update_records (record: recSimoneRichterBrightloop).
Content: notes about studio placement since Apr 6, 1BR swap pending at 47 Hereford St ($3,400/mo), cost dispute with employee, hold expires Apr 29. Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 11: Update Airtable record for Marcus Webb (BrightLoop) using airtable_update_records (record: recMarcusWebbBrightloop).
Content: vehicle delivered Apr 24 with bumper scratch, $350 credit applied to MoveOps vendor account, damage photos on file. Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 12: Update Airtable record for Emilia Cruz using airtable_update_records (record: recEmiliaCruzChicagoDenver).
Content: open complaint since Apr 12, 3 call attempts, 12+ day callback gap, $1,200 KeyMove insurance rider processed, no follow-up from MoveOps. Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 13: Update Airtable record for Jae-won Kim using airtable_update_records (record: recJaeWonKimStormCloudAustin).
Content: lease still unsigned, guarantor paperwork never sent, temp housing expiring Friday, Chloe reopened record but underlying issue unresolved. Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 14: Send email to Tessa Moreno (BrightLoop consolidated status) using send_email (to: tessa.moreno@brightloopanalytics.com).
Content: status on Simone apartment swap (1BR at Hereford St, cost question pending internal decision) + Marcus Webb car delivery with scratch ($350 credit to MoveOps vendor account, insurance guidance). Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 15: Send email to David Chen (service recovery report) using send_email (to: david.chen@moveops.com).
Content: all open cases with client, employee, issue, duration, status. Must cover BrightLoop (Simone + Marcus Webb), NorthWind (Emilia Cruz), StormCloud (Jae-won Kim), and Terraform (portal lockout). Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 16: Send email to Marcus Webb (credit + insurance answer) using send_email (to: marcus.webb@brightloopanalytics.com).
Content: clarification that $350 credit went to MoveOps vendor account, guidance on insurance claim process for bumper damage. Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 17: Send email to Simone Richter (apartment swap response) using send_email (to: simone.richter@brightloopanalytics.com).
Content: response on rent difference question and next steps for the 1BR swap at Hereford Street. Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 18: Send email to Samira Tariq about Terraform portal issue using send_email or forward_email (to: samira.tariq@moveops.com).
Content: forwarding Rachel Nguyen's report that Samantha Obi and Marcus Liu are locked out of the self-service portal while Priya Dasgupta works fine. The prompt says "Forward the Terraform portal issue to Samira so engineering can look at it." Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 19: Post service recovery report in #customer-support (C007) using conversations_add_message (channel: C007).
Content: full report covering all open cases with client, employee, issue, duration, resolution status. Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 20: Post BrightLoop status in #customer-engagement (C002) using conversations_add_message (channel: C002).
Content: summary for Mina before her Tessa call covering Simone apartment swap status and Marcus Webb car damage/credit status. Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 21: Create Linear tracking tickets for untracked cases using linear_create_issue. Based on OE 9 findings, cases without existing tickets likely include: Jae-won Kim lease follow-up, Terraform portal lockout, and possibly Emilia Cruz callback gap (NorthWind ticket exists but is about retention, not the specific callback). Agent should create at least one new ticket. Write action. Goes to Outcome.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
